---
title: "Research"
---

Works in Progress:

1.  Foreign Lobbying and Legislative Behavior

Data:

1.  Roberts, Margaret E., Lei Guang, Young Yang, Harris Doshay, and Rachel Yu (2023). [Congressional Tweets on China Dashboard](https://chinadatalab.ucsd.edu/tweets/).

Relevant Writing:

1.  Yang, Young and Rachel Yu (2023) "[Congressional Tweets on China: A Guide to Using the Data Portal](https://chinadatalab.ucsd.edu/viz-blog/congressional-tweets-on-china-portal/)", China Data Lab, 21st Century China Center.

2.  Yu, Rachel (2020) "China's Public Diplomacy Strategy in Latin America and the Caribbean" *Sigma Iota Rho: Online Journal of International Relations.*
